name: teleton-code
description: Local-first companion IDE for Teleton Agent with a Teleton-powered code agent
author: Yukinaton

scripts.build: npm --prefix client-new run build && node scripts/sync-client-build.mjs

server/lib/workspace-utils.js && node --check scripts/agent-metrics.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-client-build.mjs && node --check cli/index.js && node --check bin/teleton-code.js
